displayNameZh: 直接为 KOL 粉丝做一个专属 APP
summary: Yt Exclusive App component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「直接为 KOL 粉丝做一个专属 APP」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-exclusive-app/src/YtExclusiveApp.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtExclusiveApp` and `ytExclusiveAppDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Exclusive App Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-exclusive-app to my project. Preserve the exported YtExclusiveAppProps API and register the YtExclusiveApp composition with the default props.
